assets_and_content.icon_prompt: game icon, skill, frost nova, ice shards, blue crystal explosion, circular shockwave, frozen ground, stylized 2D flat design
assets_and_content.rich_text_desc: 以自身为中心释放冰霜冲击波，冻结周围敌人。基础伤害：<color=#4488FF>45</color>，冻结时长：<color=#4488FF>2.5</color>秒，作用半径：<color=#4488FF>200</color>
